method: measure internal diameter at multiple body stations
target_or_acceptance: record measured values with tool and station labels
notes: Required before bore CAD or tube sourcing can become authoritative.

method: measure or design center positions from a reviewed template
target_or_acceptance: record center from mouthpiece datum and hole diameter
notes: Do not infer tone-hole map from images.

method: record reed brand cut and strength
target_or_acceptance: record exact reed used for each pitch and response pass
notes: Reed setup controls the closed-end boundary condition.

method: tuner pass with room temperature and fingering notes
target_or_acceptance: record target note observed note cents and stability
notes: Attach evidence as CSV or log before tuning changes.

method: light suction or pressure check by joint and closure
target_or_acceptance: all test closures pass before pitch table
notes: Leak status must be tied to the same setup as the pitch table.

method: player notes for onset register behavior and squeak risk
target_or_acceptance: record stable unstable and failed notes
notes: Response notes decide whether geometry is ready for CAD iteration.

target_or_acceptance: all required stations have measured values repeat counts and tool notes
notes: Required before bore or body-stock CAD/DXF authority.

target_or_acceptance: each tone-hole row has center diameter chimney closure orientation and evidence
notes: Required before drilling coordinates or tone-hole DXF authority.

target_or_acceptance: each pitch and response pass cites a setup_id
notes: Setup controls the closed-end boundary condition.

target_or_acceptance: all gates pass before fabrication authority is claimed
notes: Generated images and previews remain non-dimensional support only.
